channel.title: Plugins on OWASP Coraza
channel.description: Recent content in Plugins on OWASP Coraza

item.title: Coraza Core Ruleset
item.description: Coraza Coreruleset is a Go package meant to provide the OWASP CRS in an easy and consumable way to be embedded in a Go application. Alongside the unmodified CRS, the Coraza configuration file is also provided.

item.title: GeoIP
item.description:
Introduction

This plugin enables GeoIP lookup functionality for Coraza Web Application Firewall (WAF) by utilizing a GeoIP database. With this, you can efficiently track and filter requests based on geographical origins.
